Container.Name: ProxyWake
Container.Overview: ProxyWake wakes sleeping devices on your network when they are accessed through a reverse proxy. Built for Nginx Proxy Manager, Traefik, Caddy and homelab setups.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent application data, database, logs and configuration.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Required. Set a long random secret key for stable sessions and security. Example: generate at least 32 random characters.

Config.Name: Password
Config.Description: Optional. Web UI login password. Leave empty to set via the first-run setup wizard.

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Optional. Comma-separated allowed origins, for example https://proxywake.example.com. Leave empty for local direct access.

Config.Name: Session Cookie Secure
Config.Description: Set to true only when ProxyWake is accessed through HTTPS. Keep false for direct HTTP access via Unraid IP.
